VAL-ABS-001.title: ProviderTransport trait object safety
VAL-ABS-001.evidence: Both tests passed: provider_trait_object_safe confirmed the trait can be used as dyn ProviderTransport, box_dyn_provider_is_send_sync confirmed Box<dyn ProviderTransport> is Send + Sync. 2 tests passed, 0 failed.

VAL-ABS-016.title: AgentType all six variants constructible and serializable
VAL-ABS-016.evidence: All 4 tests passed: agent_type_all_variants confirmed all 6 variants constructible, agent_type_serde_roundtrip confirmed serde round-trip, agent_type_display confirmed Display impl, uniffi_agent_type_all_variants_stability confirmed UniFFI stability. 4 tests passed, 0 failed.

VAL-ABS-017.title: ProviderEvent all 34 variants constructible and serializable
VAL-ABS-017.evidence: All 4 tests passed: provider_event_all_variants_instantiate confirmed all variants constructible, provider_event_serde_roundtrip confirmed serde round-trip, provider_event_unknown_catch_all confirmed unknown variant catch-all, uniffi_provider_event_all_variants_stability confirmed UniFFI stability. 4 tests passed, 0 failed.

VAL-ABS-018.title: AgentPermissionPolicy serialization and default
VAL-ABS-018.evidence: All 3 tests passed: agent_permission_policy_all_variants confirmed all variants, agent_permission_policy_default_is_prompt_always confirmed default is PromptAlways, agent_permission_policy_serde_roundtrip confirmed serde round-trip. 3 tests passed, 0 failed.

VAL-ABS-019.title: ProviderConfig defaults to Codex agent type
VAL-ABS-019.evidence: Test passed: provider_config_default_is_codex confirmed default AgentType is Codex. 1 test passed, 0 failed.

VAL-ABS-020.title: AgentInfo and SessionInfo records are UniFFI-safe
VAL-ABS-020.evidence: All 3 tests passed: agent_info_record_construction confirmed AgentInfo construction, agent_info_serde_roundtrip confirmed serde round-trip, session_info_record_construction confirmed SessionInfo construction. 3 tests passed, 0 failed.

VAL-ABS-043.title: CodexProvider worker task lifecycle
VAL-ABS-043.evidence: All 6 tests passed: codex_provider_implements_trait confirmed trait implementation, codex_provider_drop_impl_exists confirmed Drop/cleanup lifecycle, mobile_client_dispatches_codex_provider confirmed worker spawns and dispatches events via tokio::select! (logs show provider-backed session worker exit), regression_resolve_no_op_for_non_codex_provider confirmed resolve-noop path. 6 tests passed, 0 failed.

VAL-ABS-046.title: UniFFI bindings compile for both platforms
VAL-ABS-046.evidence: cargo check --manifest-path shared/rust-bridge/codex-mobile-client/Cargo.toml exited with code 0. Compilation succeeded with no errors.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: all 8 passed. 23 cargo tests passed across 7 assertion groups, plus 1 cargo check succeeded for compilation verification.
